description.ko: 음향 진동을 역동적인 빛 패턴과 기하학적 구조로 변환하여 소리의 주파수를 시각적으로 탐구하는 매혹적인 경험입니다.
description.en: A mesmerizing visual exploration of sound frequencies, translating acoustic vibrations into dynamic light patterns and geometric structures.

prompt: Abstract 3D visualization of sound waves, pulsating concentric ripples, glowing neon cyan and deep violet gradients, fluid motion, cinematic lighting, high-resolution digital art, reverberating echoes, ECHO-0 theme, futuristic sonic architecture.
